title: US Senate blocks resolution that would stop attacks in Iran
description: US senators narrowly blocked the so-called "#war powers resolution", which would require congressional approval for any future strikes in #Iran. A similar vote is expected on March 5 in the #US House of Representatives, where Republicans also hold a slight majority.

title: European countries to deploy military assets to Cyprus after drone attack on UK base
description: Italy, France, Spain and the Netherlands will send naval assets to Cyprus after an Iranian-made drone struck a British base there, Italy's defence minister said Thursday. France also said it would allow US aircraft to access some of its bases in the Middle East during the conflict with Iran.

title: Azerbaijan's President Aliyev vows retaliation after 'terrorist' drone strike blamed on Iran
description: Baku has vowed to retaliate against what it described as "a terrorist act" allegedly carried out by Tehran after two drones hit an airport and narrowly missed a school building in Azerbaijan's Nakhchivan exclave on the border with Iran. The Islamic Republic has denied carrying out the attack.

title: Iran war is now 'a logistical battle': Former head of the French military mission to the UN
description: The former head of the French military mission to the UN has spoken to FRANCE 24 about how long the war in the Middle East could go on. General Dominique Trinquand says the war is now a logistics battle, which depends entirely on how many drones and missiles, and the means of launching them, remain. title: Israel keeps up Lebanon strikes, more than 83,000 people displaced
description: Israel's attacks on Lebanon entered a fourth day on Thursday, killing at least two according to state media, after Israeli forces pushed into border towns and conducted air strikes targeting Iran-backed militant group Hezbollah. Lebanon was drawn into the Middle East war on Monday, when Hezbollah attacked Israel in response to the killing of Iranian supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei during US-Israeli strikes over the weekend.

title: Iran pummeled by intensive airstrikes as war enters day six
description: The US-Israeli campaign against Iran entered its sixth day on Thursday with what residents described as even more intensive bombing, while Iran vowed to retaliate anywhere ​for a US attack on a ship thousands of miles from the battle zone. "Increasingly, these airstrikes are targeting locations that have nothing to do with the military," explains FRANCE 24's Reza Sayah, reporting from Tehran, Iran.

title: 'No to Israel': US veteran violently dragged from Senate during protest
description:
Footage posted by the anti-war women’s group Code Pink and verified by Reuters shows US Marine veteran Brian McGinnis shouting slogans such as “no one wants to fight for Israel” as he interrupts a Senate Armed Services subcommittee hearing.
 
Shortly before, the US veteran posted a video on social media saying he was at the Senate to demand explanations about the deployment of US troops to the Middle East and to protest against the war in Iran.

description: Joani Reid, a Labour member of parliament, said she had never “seen anything to suspect” her husband had broken the law. The Metropolitan Police said three men were arrested under the National Security Act.

title: NYT указала на "смертоносное оружие" Ирана в войне против США и Израиля
description: Иранские беспилотники стали "смертоносным оружием" Ирана в военных действиях против США и Израиля. На это обратила внимание американская газета The New York Times.

title: WP сообщила, что ВС США скоро придется экономить боеприпасы для ПВО из-за атак Ирана
description: В ближайшие дни американским военным, возможно, придется начать экономить боеприпасы для средств противовоздушной обороны в связи с постоянными иранскими атаками на американские объекты на Ближнем Востоке, сообщила The Washington Post со ссылкой на три источника, знакомых с ситуацией.

title: Iran postpones funeral for Khamenei — state media
description:
Officials say ceremony delayed due to expected 'unprecedented turnout,' citing need to prepare infrastructure; authorities don't link move to security concerns
The post Iran postpones funeral for Khamenei  state media appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: War set to cost $3 billion a week if current limits on economy persist, ministry warns
description:
Finance Ministry chief urges the easing of Home Front Command workplace restrictions from Thursday to allow for the gradual reopening of economic activity
The post War set to cost $3 billion a week if current limits on economy persist, ministry warns appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: The US and Israel are fighting the same war — in opposite political realities
description:
The Iran war is very popular in Israel. In the US it's deeply unpopular, which could be dangerous for Israel, especially if Americans feel they're fighting on Jerusalem's behalf
The post The US and Israel are fighting the same war — in opposite political realities appeared first on The Times of Israel.
